title: Ride Any Mob
description: Ride Any Mob lets you mount and fully control almost any living entity in Minecraft.
body:
## Ride Any Mob

**Ride Any Mob** lets you mount and fully control almost any living entity in Minecraft.
From zombies to dragons, if it moves, you can ride it.

Take direct control of any entity and move with WASD, just like a horse. Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

![A player riding a Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1729aa08e3b53fb9188a1c702faccf3297daaada.png)

## **Commands**
**Server Commands (Operators Only)**

```
/ridewhitelist add <player>
```

Allow a player to ride mobs

```
/ridewhitelist remove <player>
```

Remove a player from the whitelist

```
/ridewhitelist list
```

View all whitelisted players

![A player rides an Enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91bfe66b3d67e97c19a07183cac084484360194a.png)

**Keybind**

Toggle Ride Mode

Configurable in the Controls menu. Allows switching between riding mobs and normal mob interaction (feeding, breeding, etc.).

### **Features**
- Ride most vanilla mobs
- Full player movement control
- Server-side whitelist system
- Client-side toggle via keybind
- Simple and lightweight
- Multiplayer compatible

## **Contact**

For questions, bug reports, or suggestions, feel free to reach out on Discord:

@Aervial
